content: Gate 1 is for VIPs. Gate 2, 3, and 4 are for General Admission. Gate 4 is located on the North side next to the main parking lot.
Prohibited items include large bags, outside food or drinks, weapons, flares, professional cameras, and umbrellas. Small transparent bags are allowed.
Food Court A is near Gate 2. Food Court B is on the East Concourse near Section 112. Both offer vegetarian and halal options.
Washrooms are located near every exit. The nearest washroom to Section 112 is located just behind Food Court B.
Gates open 3 hours before kick-off. The opening ceremony begins 1 hour before the first match.
First Aid stations are located near Gate 1, Section 105, and Section 210. In case of emergency, notify the nearest volunteer immediately.
